title: nephrodium erythrosorum
intro: Nephrodium erythrosorum, also known as the Red Rasp Fern, is a species of fern that is native to the tropical forests of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nephrodium erythrosorum include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating skin conditions and wounds. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
